frontmatter.title: openai-codex（OpenAI 本地 coding agent CLI/TUI）
frontmatter.description: OpenAI 出品的 Rust workspace 本地 coding agent，把 sandbox 与 approval policy 解耦成两条独立轴；hooks / skills / MCP / memory / sub-agent 全套生态。
frontmatter.size_estimate: ~100 Rust crates in codex-rs/ workspace, CLI main.rs 3960 LoC, 67M clone
frontmatter.tier_group: MCP 生态 + 同类工具

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: Codex CLI is a coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your computer.
pub enum AskForApproval { UnlessTrusted (untrusted), OnFailure, OnRequest (default), Granular(GranularApprovalConfig), Never }
pub enum SandboxModeCliArg { ReadOnly, WorkspaceWrite, DangerFullAccess }
The pipeline is triggered when a root session starts, and only if: the session is not ephemeral, the memory feature is enabled, the session is not a sub-agent session, the state DB is available.
Avoid large modules: Prefer adding new modules instead of growing existing ones. Target Rust modules under 500 LoC, excluding tests.

audience_judgment_basis: Codex 是面向 Rust 工程师 + 企业 admin 的 CLI；Rust workspace 体量（~100 crate、AGENTS.md 强制 module size 治理）说明读者需要 cs_background=yes；sandbox × approval 双轴设计面向运维/企业部署（devops=mid）；直接对标 CC 但概念命名高度相似，要求读者已是 CC advanced 用户才能看透对比价值（cc_experience=advanced）。
fetched_via_log: git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 clone --depth=1 https://github.com/openai/codex → 67M shallow clone, HEAD=598125109d
_validation_issues_at_subagent_return: P23: card_body_markdown 含 HTML entity > & 需 unescape
P21: char_count 2356 超 methodology × Card 上限 1800 → overflow:true ✓ 标了
